description_long: This triumphal arch features two tall, rounded arches made of a reddish-brown material, joined at the top center to form a symmetrical, heart-like shape. At the base of the arches, a single vertical column with a striped yellow and white pattern and a square pedestal anchors the structure. The column is adorned with a decorative capital and a central, diamond-shaped ornament, adding a touch of classical detail. The arches themselves are smooth and unadorned, emphasizing their elegant curvature. The overall design is minimalistic, with a focus on geometric forms and subtle color contrasts. The structure appears to be freestanding and would serve as a striking urban landmark or gateway.
description: A double-arched, reddish-brown triumphal arch with a central striped column and minimal classical detailing. The design is geometric and visually striking.
description_view_0: Front view showing both rounded arches, the central striped column, and decorative capital.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the arches and the column, with minimal visible detail.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, displaying both arches and the central column with its decorations.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and lack of depth.
